text: Planning a trip is always exciting for me. I enjoy researching destinations, booking flights, and creating a rough itinerary. Last summer, I visited Japan for two weeks. Experiencing a new culture was amazing; I loved the polite customs and the peaceful temples. The food was a highlight—trying fresh sushi and steaming ramen from small street stalls was unforgettable. However, language barriers sometimes made ordering tricky. I used hand gestures and a translation app, which led to a few funny moments. Despite the challenges, every experience became a valuable memory. Those travel memories remind me how beautiful it is to explore the unknown.
